subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-02
subcodes.first_line: The divine religions were revealed for love and amity and have brought about harmony among the different peoples and nations. But as time passed dogmas
subcodes.first_line_orig: ادیان الهیه برای الفت و محبت بوده و سبب اتفاق ملل و امم مختلفه گشته اما چون مدتی گذشت
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @oneness; unity of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas
